# Supplementary Note 1 — PAC formalism for resistance learnability

**Generated files (do not edit by hand):**

- `manuscript/SUPPLEMENTARY_NOTE_1_PAC.pdf` — upload with submission
- `manuscript/SUPPLEMENTARY_NOTE_1_PAC.docx` — editable Word source

**Rebuild:**

```bash
python scripts/build_supplementary_note_1.py
```

**Content source:** `manuscript/supplementary_note_1_content.py`

Full theorem statements and proofs: https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-9848110/v1
